creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
What's the configuration here? (pf rules, network layout, ...)

Can this be reproduced? Consistently or intermittently?

Follow the instructions on https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug/ and extract a kgdb backtrace as well as all local variables in the pf_find_state_all_exists() and pf_get_sport() frames (`frame XX`, `info locals`).
